```python id="uW3xb9VemGUx"
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from sklearn.datasets import fetch_20newsgroups
from matplotlib import pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns 
```

```python id="AyCLoTtsPUoO"
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")

from tqdm import tqdm

from sklearn.linear_model import SGDClassifier
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier
from sklearn.svm import LinearSVC
from sklearn.model_selection import cross_val_score
```

```python id="sZV30aoSjoYw"
# LSTM for sequence classification in the IMDB dataset
import tensorflow as tf
from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential
from tensorflow.keras.layers import Dense
from tensorflow.keras.layers import LSTM
from tensorflow.keras.layers import Embedding
from tensorflow.keras.preprocessing import sequence
```

<!-- #region id="FZDhkARXP5zw" -->
# Préparation des Données Déséquilibrées
<!-- #endregion -->

```python id="iiIlBtCSm10m"
newsgroups_train = fetch_20newsgroups(subset='train', remove=('headers', 'footers', 'quotes'))

df = pd.DataFrame([newsgroups_train.data, newsgroups_train.target.tolist()]).T
df.columns = ['text', 'target']

targets = pd.DataFrame( newsgroups_train.target_names)
targets.columns=['title']

Train_set = pd.merge(df, targets, left_on='target', right_index=True)

#########################################################################################################

newsgroups_train = fetch_20newsgroups(subset='test', remove=('headers', 'footers', 'quotes'))

df = pd.DataFrame([newsgroups_train.data, newsgroups_train.target.tolist()]).T
df.columns = ['text', 'target']

targets = pd.DataFrame( newsgroups_train.target_names)
targets.columns=['title']

Test_set = pd.merge(df, targets, left_on='target', right_index=True)
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"} id="KyD6sjyWgtyj" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1667983251133, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 36, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="7a3fe7fd-8eb4-496c-e1d6-c6d2bd8c5fd7"
import random
Dict_freq =  { k: random.randint(0, 50)/100  for k in list(Train_set["title"].unique()) } 
print(Dict_freq)
```

```python id="wafuvAEH0GRh"
def sampled_cat( df , Dict_freq , col ):
    out = pd.DataFrame(columns= df.columns)
    if len(Dict_freq.keys())==1:
        pass
    else :
        for cat ,freq in Dict_freq.items():
            temp = df[df[col]==cat]
            temp = temp.sample(frac = freq)
            out = pd.concat([out, temp])
    return out
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/", "height": 241} id="I8jQ6uO1dA1C" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1667983251134, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 28, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="67485d28-9579-4a97-d289-c3377f8539eb"
print("Test_set", Test_set.shape)
out = sampled_cat( Test_set , Dict_freq , "title" )
print("out", out.shape)
out.head()
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/", "height": 241} id="TmeJXJXxdnFX" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1667983251135, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 24, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="9cef72dd-c09d-4bc4-9477-1c286dfd06fd"
print("Test_set", Test_set.shape)
Test_set = pd.merge(Test_set, out , on=["text", "target"], how="outer", indicator=True , suffixes=('', '_temp'))
Test_set = Test_set.loc[Test_set["_merge"] == "left_only"].drop("_merge", axis=1)
Test_set = Test_set.loc[:,~Test_set.columns.str.contains('_temp', case=False)] 
print("Test_set", Test_set.shape)
Test_set.head()
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/", "height": 241} id="SmiHvF5DHap5" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1667983252005, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 888, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="8d4875a2-85d7-4567-8a48-4b2930c300b2"
print("Train_set", Train_set.shape)
Train_set  = pd.concat([Train_set, out])
print("Train_set", Train_set.shape)
Train_set.head()
```

ax_test.set(ylim=(0, 800))
ax_test.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=25)
ax_test.set_title('Test_set')
ax_test.set_xlabel('Label')

plt.show()

```python id="RdBIWzLb4Pd8"
import nltk
from nltk.corpus import stopwords
from nltk.stem import WordNetLemmatizer
from nltk.stem import PorterStemmer
```

```python id="3QBApveJd7iZ"
cachedStopWords = stopwords.words("english")

def delete_Stop_Word(text):
    #reg = r'[0 - 9]+'
    #text = re.sub(reg, '', text)
    text = text.replace('_',"")
    text = ''.join([token for token in text if not token.isdigit()])
    text =  ' '.join([word.lower() for word in text.split() if word not in cachedStopWords])
    return text
```

```python id="mKqWbNHj4ILn"
stop_words = set(stopwords.words('english'))

stemmer = PorterStemmer()
lemmatizer = WordNetLemmatizer()

def Stemmer(text):
    text=[stemmer.stem(words) for words in text.split(" ") if words not in stop_words]
    return " ".join(text)

def Lemmatizer(text):
    text=[lemmatizer.lemmatize(words) for words in text.split(" ") if words not in stop_words]
    return " ".join(text)

special_digits = re.compile('[0-9]+')
special_chars = re.compile('[/(){}\[\]\\@;]')
special_space = re.compile(' +')
special_under = re.compile('_+')

def clean_text(text, Lema, Stem) :
    text=text.lower()
    text = special_digits.sub(" ",text)
    text = special_chars.sub(" ",text)
    text = special_space.sub(" ", text)
    text = special_under.sub(" ", text)
    if Lema:
        text = Lemmatizer(text)
    if Stem:
        text = Stemmer(text)
    return text
    
```

<!-- #region id="FZF8NislnECm" -->
Stemmer
<!-- #endregion -->

```python id="eIj3zRXInQOh" executionInfo={"status": "error", "timestamp": 1667995985221, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 13587, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/", "height": 363} outputId="f0d65c44-8e31-4c25-dec7-4c3f1f56a3e3"
Train_set_Stemmer = Train_set.copy()
Test_set_Stemmer = Test_set.copy()

Lema , Stem =  False , True

Train_set_Stemmer['text'] = Train_set_Stemmer['text'].apply(lambda text:clean_text(text, Lema , Stem) )
Test_set_Stemmer['text'] = Test_set_Stemmer['text'].apply(lambda text:clean_text(text, Lema , Stem) )
```

```python id="eogceNDwnBDP"

Test_set_Lematizer = Test_set.copy()
Lema , Stem =  True , False

Train_set_Lematizer['text'] = Train_set_Lematizer['text'].apply(lambda text:clean_text(text, Lema , Stem) )
Test_set_Lematizer['text'] = Test_set_Lematizer['text'].apply(lambda text:clean_text(text, Lema , Stem) )
```

```python id="yG8UeGP9nBNB"
Train_set_LematizerStemmer = Train_set.copy()
Test_set_LematizerStemmer = Test_set.copy()

Lema , Stem =  True , True

Train_set_LematizerStemmer['text'] = Train_set_LematizerStemmer['text'].apply(lambda text:clean_text(text, Lema , Stem) )
Test_set_LematizerStemmer['text'] = Test_set_LematizerStemmer['text'].apply(lambda text:clean_text(text, Lema , Stem) )
```

<!-- #region id="fgQXPO5gqtgK" -->
## Modèles 
<!-- #endregion -->

```python id="5ZvvOdenZUBx"
models = [
    SGDClassifier(max_iter=500, tol=1e-3),
    RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=500, max_depth=50, random_state=0),
    LinearSVC(),
    MultinomialNB(),
    LogisticRegression(random_state=0),
]
```

```python id="XHnqJ0BdkyFL"
def call_models(models, x , y , CV , metric ):
    cv_df = pd.DataFrame(index=range(CV * len(models)))
    entries = []

    for model in tqdm(models):
        model_name = model.__class__.__name__
        accuracies = cross_val_score(model, x, y , scoring= metric, cv=CV)
        for fold_idx, f1_macro in enumerate(accuracies):
            entries.append((model_name, fold_idx, f1_macro))
    cv_df = pd.DataFrame(entries, columns=['model_name', 'fold_idx', metric])

    return cv_df
```

```python id="81dvo6FYlc2M"
metric = 'f1_macro'
```

<!-- #region id="9SExiGOgaN10" -->
# Embedding - Vectorisation 
<!-- #endregion -->

<!-- #region id="iKH9TlxztMQZ" -->
### Bag of Words
<!-- #endregion -->

```python id="9fo9b_d1tLrM"
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import CountVectorizer
```

```python id="iyOLSdxznHze"
def BOW(Train_set, text, label, max_features , min_features):
    # initialize
    cv = CountVectorizer(stop_words='english', max_features=5000) 
    cv_matrix = cv.fit_transform(Train_set[text]) 

    df_dtm = pd.DataFrame(cv_matrix.toarray(), columns=cv.get_feature_names_out())
    for col in df_dtm.columns:
        tot =  df_dtm[col].sum()
    if tot < min_features:
        df_dtm.drop(col, axis=1,inplace=True)
    
    return df_dtm
```

<!-- #region id="YpOTL1mZnuX9" -->
#### Model call
<!-- #endregion -->

```

LEnc = preprocessing.LabelEncoder()
Lenc_data = pd.DataFrame( LEnc.fit_transform(Train_set_Lematizer['title'].values))
```

<!-- #region id="zwYijDxemAoy" -->
**LSTM**

Signifiant *Long Short-Term Memory*, est une cellule composée de trois « portes » : 
ce sont des zones de calculs qui régulent le flot d’informations (en réalisant des actions spécifiques). On a également deux types de sorties (nommées états).

Forget gate (porte d’oubli)
Input gate (porte d’entrée)
Output gate (porte de sortie)
Hidden state (état caché)
Cell state (état de la cellule)

![image.png](data:image/png;base64,)

**LSTM bidirectionnel**

pour la classification de séquences
Parfois, il est préférable d'utiliser une séquence dans un ordre inversé. Dans ces cas, vous pouvez simplement inverser un vecteur x en utilisant la syntaxe Python x[::-1] avant de l'utiliser pour entraîner votre réseau LSTM.


Un réseau LSTM bidirectionnel est simplement constitué de deux réseaux LSTM distincts, l'un alimenté par une séquence avant et l'autre par une séquence inversée. Ensuite, la sortie des deux réseaux LSTM est concaténée avant d'être transmise aux couches suivantes du réseau.

**LSTM et CNN**


Les réseaux neuronaux convolutifs excellent dans l'apprentissage de la structure spatiale des données d'entrée.

Les données de critiques IMDB ont une structure spatiale unidimensionnelle dans la séquence de mots des critiques, et le CNN peut être en mesure d'identifier des caractéristiques invariantes pour le bon et le mauvais sentiment. Cette caractéristique spatiale apprise peut ensuite être apprise sous forme de séquences par une couche LSTM. L'ajout d'une couche max pooling permet de sous-échantillonner la séquence lors de sa classification par un réseau de neurones. Le but de cette couche est de réduire la taille des séquences sans modifier les features importantes de celle ci.


<!-- #endregion -->

```python id="qEcNYe8Fl_Se"
from keras import backend as K

def recall_m(y_true, y_pred):
    true_positives = K.sum(K.round(K.clip(y_true * y_pred, 0, 1)))
    possible_positives = K.sum(K.round(K.clip(y_true, 0, 1)))
    recall = true_positives / (possible_positives + K.epsilon())
    return recall

def precision_m(y_true, y_pred):
    true_positives = K.sum(K.round(K.clip(y_true * y_pred, 0, 1)))
    predicted_positives = K.sum(K.round(K.clip(y_pred, 0, 1)))
    precision = true_positives / (predicted_positives + K.epsilon())
    return precision

def f1_m(y_true, y_pred):
    precision = precision_m(y_true, y_pred)
    recall = recall_m(y_true, y_pred)
    return 2*((precision*recall)/(precision+recall+K.epsilon()))

#add on model
metrics=['acc',f1_m,precision_m, recall_m]

#implement model 

""" definition du model"""

#Evaluation du model 

loss, accuracy, f1_score, precision, recall = model.evaluate(Xtest, ytest, verbose=0)
```

```python id="HthlXXhPwbLa"
import tensorflow.keras.backend as K

def F1_score_Macro(y_true, y_pred): #taken from old keras source code
    true_positives = K.sum(K.round(K.clip(y_true * y_pred, 0, 1)))
    possible_positives = K.sum(K.round(K.clip(y_true, 0, 1)))
    predicted_positives = K.sum(K.round(K.clip(y_pred, 0, 1)))
    precision = true_positives / (predicted_positives + K.epsilon())
    recall = true_positives / (possible_positives + K.epsilon())
    f1_val = 2*(precision*recall)/(precision+recall+K.epsilon())
    return f1_val
```

```python id="nclVdpyPa5kb"
Epochs = 3
Metric = 'macro f-scores'
max_review_length = 500
top_words = 5000
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split


def Lstm_class(models, X, y , Epochs , Metric):
    # truncate and pad input sequences
    X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.33, random_state=42)
    X_train = sequence.pad_sequences(X_train.values, maxlen=max_review_length)
    X_test = sequence.pad_sequences(X_test.values, maxlen=max_review_length)
    # create the model

    embedding_vecor_length = 32
    model = Sequential()
    model.add(Embedding(top_words, embedding_vecor_length, input_length=max_review_length))
    #model.add(Conv1D(filters=32, kernel_size=3, padding='same', activation='relu'))
    #model.add(MaxPooling1D(pool_size=2))
    model.add(LSTM(100, dropout=0.2, recurrent_dropout=0.2))
    #model.add(Bidirectional(LSTM(100, dropout=0.2, recurrent_dropout=0.2)))
    model.add(Dense(1, activation='sigmoid'))
    model.compile(loss='binary_crossentropy', optimizer='adam', metrics=[F1_score_Macro])
    print(model.summary())
    model.fit(X_train, y_train, epochs=3, batch_size=64)
    # Final evaluation of the model
    scores = model.evaluate(X_test, y_test, verbose=0)
    print("F1 score Macro: %.2f%%" % (scores[1]*100))
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"} id="jBFRck7sa5nJ" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1668006604819, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 591299, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="6c981060-dea8-4b1d-9707-38a52b0633bf"
Lstm_class(models, Vect_set_Lematizer, Lenc_data , Epochs , Metric)
```

```python id="Zf3ddzdVa5qY"
from sklearn.metrics import classification_report

def return_classification_report(model, x_test , y_test ):
    y_pred = model.predict(x_test, batch_size=64, verbose=1)
    y_pred_bool = np.argmax(y_pred, axis=1)
    return classification_report(y_test, y_pred_bool)
```

BP_BOW_Lematizer = sns.boxplot(x='model_name', y='f1_macro', data=Result_BOW_Lematizer  )
ST_BOW_Lematizer = sns.stripplot(x='model_name', y='f1_macro', data=Result_BOW_Lematizer , 
              size=12, jitter=True, edgecolor="gray", linewidth=2   )

ST_BOW_Lematizer.set_title('Bag Of Word - Lematizer')
ST_BOW_Lematizer.set_xlabel('Modèles')

BP_BOW_Lematizer 
ST_BOW_Lematizer 
plt.show()

plt.figure(figsize=(28,5))
BP_BOW_Stemmer = sns.boxplot(x='model_name', y='f1_macro', data=Result_BOW_Stemmer  )
ST_BOW_Stemmer = sns.stripplot(x='model_name', y='f1_macro', data=Result_BOW_Stemmer , 
              size=12, jitter=True, edgecolor="gray", linewidth=2   )

ST_BOW_Stemmer.set_title('Bag Of Word - Stemmer')
ST_BOW_Stemmer.set_xlabel('Modèles')

BP_BOW_Stemmer 
ST_BOW_Stemmer 
plt.show()

plt.figure(figsize=(28,5))
BP_BOW_LematizerStemmer = sns.boxplot(x='model_name', y='f1_macro', data=Result_BOW_LematizerStemmer  )
ST_BOW_LematizerStemmer = sns.stripplot(x='model_name', y='f1_macro', data=Result_BOW_LematizerStemmer , 
              size=12, jitter=True, edgecolor="gray", linewidth=2   )

ST_BOW_LematizerStemmer.set_title('Bag Of Word - Lematizer + Stemmer')
ST_BOW_LematizerStemmer.set_xlabel('Modèles')

BP_BOW_LematizerStemmer 
ST_BOW_LematizerStemmer 

plt.show()
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/", "height": 206} id="5cm2FHQwAD6Q" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1667328782731, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 241, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="91286538-c3cd-4556-84c7-6af5efa1179a"
Result_BOW_Lematizer["P-Processing"] = 'Lematizer'
Result_BOW_Stemmer["P-Processing"] = 'Stemmer'
Result_BOW_LematizerStemmer["P-Processing"] ='Lematizer Stemmer'
Result = pd.concat([Result_BOW_Lematizer, Result_BOW_Stemmer, Result_BOW_LematizerStemmer])
Result["Vectoriz"] = "Bag Of Words"
Result.head()
```

<!-- #region id="SX7yo0sDaURb" -->
### TF-IDF
<!-- #endregion -->

```python id="baX2NeMIaPtt"
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import  TfidfVectorizer
```

```python id="wKi6etcforxt"
models = [
    SGDClassifier(max_iter=500, tol=1e-3),
    RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=500, max_depth=50, random_state=0),
    LinearSVC(),
    MultinomialNB(),
    LogisticRegression(random_state=0),
]
```

```python id="unc_lXwYaNUL"
def TfIdf(Train_set, text, label, CV ):
    tfidf = TfidfVectorizer(stop_words='english').fit(Train_set[text].values)
    print("NB features: %d" %(len(tfidf.vocabulary_)))
    features = tfidf.transform(Train_set[text].values)

    cv_df = pd.DataFrame(index=range(CV * len(models)))
    entries = []

    for model in tqdm(models):
        model_name = model.__class__.__name__
        accuracies = cross_val_score(model, features, Train_set[label] , scoring='f1_macro', cv=CV)
        for fold_idx, f1_macro in enumerate(accuracies):
            entries.append((model_name, fold_idx, f1_macro))
    cv_df = pd.DataFrame(entries, columns=['model_name', 'fold_idx', 'f1_macro'])

    return cv_df
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"} id="9VMb9Wnwp3aM" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1667331384428, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 427372, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="22067bc6-e4e5-4503-d768-c20df4144ff9"
 Result_TfIdf_Lematizer = TfIdf(Train_set_Lematizer, 'text', 'title',3 )
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"} id="9-T1YxwXt0ah" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1667332110893, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 340656, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="a65e7153-feb6-41ff-8006-391aea4408a3"
Result_TfIdf_Stemmer = TfIdf(Train_set_Stemmer, 'text', 'title', 3 )
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"} id="QhbG4v7kuCHE" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1667332443070, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 332182, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="f68f3608-b70b-4369-8d57-d6c53b8e5d8f"
Result_TfIdf_LematizerStemmer = TfIdf(Train_set_LematizerStemmer, 'text', 'title', 3 )
```

```python colab={"base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/", "height": 1000} id="e_FemX8owoZC" executionInfo={"status": "ok", "timestamp": 1667332513385, "user_tz": -60, "elapsed": 1250, "user": {"displayName": "Florian H.", "userId": "05323848775778397032"}} outputId="a7ca6dec-26e4-4d5e-d1a9-1c012f5dd8f5"

              size=12, jitter=True, edgecolor="gray", linewidth=2   )

ST_TfIdf_Lematizer.set_xlabel('Modèles')

plt.show()

plt.figure(figsize=(28,5))

ST_TfIdf_Stemmer = sns.stripplot(x='model_name', y='f1_macro', data=Result_TfIdf_Stemmer , 
              size=12, jitter=True, edgecolor="gray", linewidth=2   )

ST_TfIdf_Stemmer.set_xlabel('Modèles')

BP_TfIdf_Stemmer

plt.show()

plt.figure(figsize=(28,5))
